_comment: Registry of scaffold commands referenced by task descriptions / variant prompts. {project} is replaced with a placeholder name when running. Cache is built by build_scaffold_cache.py and used by analyze_edits.py to classify Writes.

next_app_default.description: Default Next.js App Router with TS + Tailwind (most common)

astro_minimal.description: Astro minimal template (also fallback for bare create astro)

remix_default.description: Remix → React Router default template (Remix v2 was upstreamed into React Router; agents that try `create-remix@latest` are redirected to this scaffold)

nuxt_default.command: echo n | npx -y nuxi@latest init {project} --template minimal --packageManager npm --no-install --no-gitInit
nuxt_default.description: Nuxt 3 default (nuxi minimal template; 'echo n' answers the post-init modules prompt)

t3_default.description: T3 stack (Next + tRPC + Prisma + Tailwind + NextAuth)

eleventy_default.command: mkdir -p {project} && cd {project} && npm init -y && npm install --save-dev --package-lock-only --no-fund --no-audit @11ty/eleventy
eleventy_default.description: Eleventy bare init (npm init + 11ty dev dep). NOTE: 11ty doesn't have a real scaffold — agents build everything by hand. Cache is essentially just package.json.

refine_default.description: Refine app (using finefoods-client example as a representative scaffold)

next_commerce.description: Next.js + Vercel Commerce starter (full e-commerce template)

django_default.command: python3 -m venv .preload_venv && .preload_venv/bin/pip install --quiet 'django>=5' && .preload_venv/bin/django-admin startproject myapp {project}; rm -rf .preload_venv
django_default.description: Django (creates a temp venv just to run django-admin startproject, then deletes the venv — only the Django project files remain)

shadcn_init.command: echo 'shadcn-init is run inside an existing project, not a primary scaffold; build script will skip.'
shadcn_init.description: shadcn/ui init (NOT a primary scaffold — runs inside an existing Next.js project to add components.json + utility files). Build script skips this entry; pattern is here only so detect_scaffold can flag overlapping files when used.
